---
title: "Xserver does not boot: reported bug"
date: 2008-10-20
forum: General Help
---

### Post by huffandy@hotmail.com on 2008-10-20
Hi I am using 7.04 FF in ubuntu, and the Xserver version has a reported bug in all versions of linux (solved in later versions of xserver-xorg install) on the sparc platform.  My question is:  how do I reinstall another version of xserver-xorg / xserver-xorg-core (working) that will work?  

here is the reported error:

xf86MapPciMem: Could not mmap PCI memory (some long address) (inappropriate ioctl for device)

I have tried SID's (it works but corrupts system) but come to no avail.

Any help would largely be appreciated.

Thanks,
Andrew

---
